reference: My son is two years and ten months old. He has been experiencing a high fever for the last four days, reaching up to one hundred and four degrees Fahrenheit, which decreases with medication. We have had his blood test done, and his C-reactive protein reading came back very high, at sixteen. Please advise me on why this C-reactive protein reading could be high. His weight is eleven kilograms.
text: My son is 2 years and 10 months old. He has been experiencing a high fever for the last 4 days, reaching up to 104°F, which decreases with medication. We have had his blood tests done, and his C-reactive protein reading came back very high, at 16. Please advise me on why this C-reactive protein reading could be high. His weight is 11 kg.
